title: dalbergia congensis
intro: Dalbergia congensis, also known as African Blackwood or Blackwood, is a tropical tree species native to the regions of central and western Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dalbergia congensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the tree's bark and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional African medicine.
